plan_review_notes: Approved the verification-linkage slice. The scope is well-bounded: derive verification artifacts from declared obligations plus receipt-backed execution state, and do not broaden into promotion or invalidation work.

plan_review_history.notes: Revised the task into a concrete verification-linkage slice: map declared follow-up verification obligations plus linked receipt evidence into evolution VerificationArtifact records, preserve the obligation method in hard state, and fail loudly on missing obligations or missing receipt linkage.

Approved the verification-linkage slice. The scope is well-bounded: derive verification artifacts from declared obligations plus receipt-backed execution state, and do not broaden into promotion or invalidation work.

spec_review_notes: Freeze scope to verification-artifact linkage only. The implementation may read follow-up source context, verification obligations, receipt projections, and task verify state to emit VerificationArtifact records. It must not add promotion/invalidation decisions or new CLI/MCP surface changes.

normal_cases.name: A follow-up task with declared obligations and passing verify results projects into `VerificationArtifact` records that preserve the obligation claim, method, and linked receipt evidence.
A follow-up task with failing verify results still produces verification artifacts, but they are marked as failed instead of passed.

edge_cases.name: Verification linkage uses only the evolution follow-up source-context obligation list and ignores unrelated source-context keys.
Multiple obligations map to stable artifact ids and share linked receipt evidence without duplicating or dropping records unpredictably.

exception_cases.name: A bridged follow-up task with no declared verification obligations fails clearly instead of fabricating verification artifacts.
A follow-up task whose linked receipts cannot be projected fails with an actionable missing-receipt error.

verification_methods.target: A follow-up task with declared obligations and passing verify results projects into VerificationArtifact records that preserve the obligation claim, method, and linked receipt evidence.
A follow-up task with failing verify results still produces verification artifacts, but they are marked as failed instead of passed.
